About this item

  • ULTIMATE BOLLYWOOD GUESSING GAME: Test your Bollywood knowledge with this fast-paced, entertaining card game packed with 200+ cards featuring iconic dialogues, actors, and more.
  • PERFECT FOR PARTIES & GAME NIGHTS: Designed for 3 to 12 players aged 14 and above, making it ideal for family gatherings, game nights, and Bollywood-themed parties.
  • GUESS, BATTLE & WIN: The exciting Clue-Guess-Battle-Win gameplay format keeps every round thrilling and competitive, ensuring non-stop fun for all Bollywood fans.
  • THOUGHTFUL GIFT IDEA: A wonderful gift for Bollywood enthusiasts, this beautifully packaged game comes in a premium black and gold box that adds a touch of glamour.
  • COMPLETE SET INCLUDED: Comes with 200+ game cards neatly organised in a sturdy box with two card holder compartments and a discard tray for smooth, hassle-free gameplay.

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Product Summary: mindovo Bollywood Trivia Card Game for Parties | Fast-Paced Guessing Game for Parties, Game Nights & Family Time | Gift for Bollywood Fans | 3-12 Players | Ages 14 & Up

    About this Item

    • ULTIMATE BOLLYWOOD GUESSING GAME: Test your Bollywood knowledge with this fast-paced, entertaining card game packed with 200+ cards featuring iconic dialogues, actors, and more.
    • PERFECT FOR PARTIES & GAME NIGHTS: Designed for 3 to 12 players aged 14 and above, making it ideal for family gatherings, game nights, and Bollywood-themed parties.
    • GUESS, BATTLE & WIN: The exciting Clue-Guess-Battle-Win gameplay format keeps every round thrilling and competitive, ensuring non-stop fun for all Bollywood fans.
    • THOUGHTFUL GIFT IDEA: A wonderful gift for Bollywood enthusiasts, this beautifully packaged game comes in a premium black and gold box that adds a touch of glamour.
    • COMPLETE SET INCLUDED: Comes with 200+ game cards neatly organised in a sturdy box with two card holder compartments and a discard tray for smooth, hassle-free gameplay.

    Product description

    Lights, camera, action! The mindovo Bollywood-Style Battle is the ultimate Bollywood guessing card game that brings the magic of Hindi cinema straight to your game night. Packed with 200+ vibrant, colourful cards, this fast-paced game challenges players to guess iconic dialogues, actors, films, and more from the world of Bollywood. Simply clue, guess, battle, and win! The beautifully designed premium box comes with two card holder trays and a discard slot, keeping everything neatly organised. Perfect for 3 to 12 players aged 14 and above, it is ideal for family gatherings, festive celebrations, kitty parties, and casual get-togethers. Whether you are a die-hard Bollywood buff or a casual fan, this game guarantees laughter, friendly rivalry, and loads of filmy fun. It also makes for a thoughtful and entertaining gift for any Bollywood enthusiast. Get ready to prove who the ultimate Bollywood champion is!
